principle: Direct the model's gaze toward the headline or CTA — when a face looks at the viewer the eye stops there and the copy is missed
explanation: X.ux|pse_gaze_direction: model_looks_at_camera -> user_fixates_on_face -> misses_text+CTA; model_looks_toward_copy -> user_gaze_follows_to_copy; applies_to: hero_banners + landing_page_images + testimonial_photos; NO:hero_image_model_facing_forward_with_key_copy_beside; eg: "model_facing_camera + headline_beside" >> "model_turned_toward_headline + headline_beside"

principle: Use images of people and interior scenes over landscapes and abstract visuals — faces and indoor contexts are retained in memory significantly longer
explanation: X.ux|pse_memorable_types: high_recall: faces + indoor_scenes + foreground_objects + human_scale; low_recall: outdoor_landscapes + wide_angles + abstract_backgrounds + nature; object_with_context > object_on_white_background; NO:landscape_hero_for_brand_recall NO:product_on_plain_white_for_emotional_connection; eg: "hero: mountain_landscape_generic" >> "hero: person_in_branded_office_using_product"

principle: Pair every key message with a supporting visual — text-only recall drops to 10% after three days while image-plus-text reaches 65%
explanation: X.ux|pse_dual_coding: text_only -> 10%_recall_after_3_days; image+text -> 65%_recall; apply_to: feature_sections + benefit_lists + how_it_works + stats; replace_bullet_lists_with_icon+label+short_description; NO:wall_of_text_for_key_benefits NO:feature_list_without_visuals; eg: "bullet: Fast delivery" >> "icon_truck + 'Fast delivery' + '2-hour window'"
